VehicleListing.title: VehicleListing
VehicleListing.description: Represents a vehicle listing in the Motores Zone application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VehicleListing entity.

make.description: The make of the vehicle (e.g., Toyota).

model.description: The model of the vehicle (e.g., Corolla).

year.description: The year the vehicle was manufactured.

priceUSD.description: The price of the vehicle in US dollars.

description.description: Detailed description of the vehicle listing.

imageUrls.description: URLs of the images associated with the vehicle listing.

locationLatitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the vehicle's location.

locationLongitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the vehicle's location.

summary.description: AI generated summary of the listing.

Seller.title: Seller
Seller.description: Represents a seller of vehicles in the Motores Zone application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Seller entity.

phoneNumber.description: The seller's phone number used for verification via WhatsApp API.

isVerified.description: Indicates whether the seller has been verified.

ExchangeRate.title: ExchangeRate
ExchangeRate.description: Represents the exchange rate between USD and VES (Bolivares).

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExchangeRate entity.

rate.description: The current exchange rate (VES per USD).

lastUpdated.description: The date and time when the exchange rate was last updated.

definition.description: Stores seller profiles. 'sellerId' corresponds to the user's auth.uid.

params.name: sellerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the seller, which is the same as the user's auth.uid.  This enforces path-based ownership.

definition.description: Stores vehicle listings associated with a specific seller. Leverages path-based ownership.

params.name: sellerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the seller, corresponding to the user's auth.uid.

params.name: vehicleListingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the vehicle listing.

definition.description: Stores exchange rate data. This is likely an admin-managed collection.

params.name: exchangeRateId
params.description: The unique identifier for the exchange rate entry.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the Motores Zone application's core features, including vehicle listings, currency conversion, seller verification, and advanced search capabilities. Authorization Independence is achieved by leveraging path-based ownership for seller data and their listings, eliminating the need for `get()` calls in security rules.  The structure facilitates secure `list` operations via Structural Segregation. All documents within a collection share the same security posture.  By separating user profiles and vehicle listings, we avoid mixing data with different access requirements within the same collection, this strategy simplifies rules and enhances security.

Specifically:

*   **/sellers/{sellerId}**: Stores seller profiles, owned by the user (seller) identified by `sellerId`.  The `sellerId` matches the `auth.uid` of the authenticated user, ensuring that only the seller can read or write their own profile.  This leverages Path-Based Ownership.
*   **/sellers/{sellerId}/vehicleListings/{vehicleListingId}**: Stores vehicle listings associated with a specific seller.  The listings are nested under the seller's document, continuing the path-based ownership model. This eliminates the need for complex authorization logic and allows for secure and efficient `list` operations of a seller's listings.
*   **/exchangeRates/{exchangeRateId}**: Stores exchange rate data.  Given that the app will use the official BCV exchange rate, this collection is designed for admin-level management.
